locations.name: 卡尔·林奈
locations.summary: 卡尔·冯·林奈（瑞典語：Carl von Linné；1707年5月23日—1778年1月10日），也譯為林内、林耐，原名卡尔·林奈乌斯（Carl Linnaeus），瑞典生物学家，瑞典科学院创始人兼第一任主席。林奈奠定了现代生物学命名法…

relations.subject: Masked water tyrant
relations.evidence: The masked water tyrant (Fluvicola nengeta) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and as a vagrant to Uruguay and Paraguay.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Masked water tyrant
relations.evidence: | title =The Birds of Ecuador: Field Guide | publisher =Cornell University Press | volume = II| date =2001 | location =Ithaca | pages =516–517 | isbn =978-0-8014-8721-7 }} The masked water tyrant inhabits somewhat open shrublands near freshwater bodies, and especially favors marshy areas and rice fields
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Masked water tyrant
relations.evidence: It also occurs on the banks of ponds, lakes, streams, and rivers and occasionally is found in nearby open grasslands
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
